channel.title: Garage Gym Gazette
channel.description: Fresh takes for home lifters building garage gyms.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your racks in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying racks project for home lifters building garage gyms — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Fitness is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the flooring community this week.

item.title: The programming checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified programming purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of barbells
item.description: The most common early stumbles in barbells, and the cheap corrections that fix them for home lifters building garage gyms.

item.title: "home gym programming" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about home gym programming through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your flooring questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the flooring questions home lifters building garage gyms keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in programming with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest programming adjustments that home lifters building garage gyms report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: home gym programming
item.description: The persistent myths around home gym programming, stress-tested against what home lifters building garage gyms actually report.
